name: WMIC Shadow Copy Deletion
description: Detects use of wmic.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a precursor commonly observed before ransomware encryption to prevent recovery.
query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name == "wmic.exe" and process.args : "shadowcopy" and process.args : "delete"
false_positives: Backup software occasionally prunes shadow copies during scheduled maintenance.

name: Scheduled Task Created From User Writable Path
description: Identifies schtasks.exe creating a task whose action points at a user-writable directory such as the temp or downloads folder, a frequent persistence technique.
query: process.name : "schtasks.exe" and process.args : "/create" and process.args : ("*\\Temp\\*" or "*\\Downloads\\*")
false_positives: Some installers stage tasks from a temp directory during setup.
